prerequisites: An active Judge.me account connected to your store (Judge.me is installed on a supported store, such as a Shopify shop).
Your shop domain, used for the required shop_domain config field (for example, mystore.myshopify.com).
A Judge.me private API token, used for the required api_key secret field. Retrieve it from the Judge.me app under General Settings > Integrations > View API Token.
A start date to define the earliest record to sync, used for the required start_date config field.

authMethods.name: API token (api_key)
authMethods.summary: Judge.me authenticates each request with a private API token. Provide it in the connector's api_key secret field. Judge.me passes the token to its REST API as the api_token query parameter alongside shop_domain, scoping access to a single store. You obtain the token from the Judge.me app under General Settings > Integrations > View API Token (the Private Key value).

setupSteps.title: Get your Judge.me API token
setupSteps.body: Open the Judge.me app for your store, go to General Settings, then Integrations, and click View API Token. Copy the Private Key value. This is the token used for the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Identify your shop domain
setupSteps.body: Determine the shop domain Judge.me is connected to (for example, mystore.myshopify.com). This value is required for the shop_domain config field, which scopes the API to your store.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied token into the api_key secret field, set shop_domain to your store domain, and set start_date to the earliest date from which reviews should be synced. All three fields are required.

sources.title: Judge.me User Management API Guide - Stitchflow
Where Can I Find My Judge.me API Key? - Greenspark Knowledge Base
